		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;

	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Autowire&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;1 to N Connections&lt;/span&gt;

&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;B- &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;N&amp;#160;Flow properties&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Send Port: Energy&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=heat (out)&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Rec Port 1: Energy&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=heat (in)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;R&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;ec Port 2: Energy&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=electricity (in)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>

		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;

  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Autowire&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;1 to N Connections&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

&amp;#160;

    &lt;p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=heat (in)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;R&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;ec Port 2: Energy&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;head&gt;

  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Autowire&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;1 to N Connections&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;A&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;- Same flow property&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Send Port: Energy&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=heat (out)&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Rec Port 1: Energy&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=heat (in)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;R&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;ec Port 2: Energy&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=heat (in)&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_2022x_3040122_1644577977454_27559_3217</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_2022x_2_efc035c_1729106289808_610274_17844'>

			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>952, 21, 116, 246</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Autowire&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;1 to N Connections&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;B- &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;N&amp;#160;Flow properties&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Send Port: Energy&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=heat (out)&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;Rec Port 1: Energy&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=heat (in)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;R&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;ec Port 2: Energy&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;FP=electricity (in)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:12pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
